creator: nenet54324@mvpalace.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #1)

I'd say libclc should even go to llvm port as its part indeed. This will allow to not worry about 'version sync' stuff as in wasi-* ports. But I'm unsure what would be the best here.

I must also disagree with 'Many' severity -- most ppl don't care too much on LLVM version from ports which is being built. Likely 'Some' will be more correct here.
